name: estate-commission-app
description: Full-stack estate agency commission tracking system (NestJS + Nuxt 3 + MongoDB Atlas).

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c yellow,cyan "npm --prefix backend run start:dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix backend run build && npm --prefix frontend run build
